title: AN ACT CONVERTING SAN CARLOS RURAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN CARLOS, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, INTO A NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SPEAKER EUGENIO PEREZ NAÂ­TIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL, AND AUÂ­THORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 565 / 60 OG No. 40, 6360 (October 5, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3882, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING SAN CARLOS RURAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN CARLOS, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, INTO A NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SPEAKER EUGENIO PEREZ NAÂTIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL, AND AUÂTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives, of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The San Carlos Rural High School in the Municipality of San Carlos, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby converted into a national agricultural school to be known as Speaker Eugenio Perez National Agricultural School.

SEC. 2. The sum of one hundred thousand pesos is hereÂby authorized to be appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the conversion, operation and maintenance of said school durÂing the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-five. ThereÂafter, such sums as may be needed for its .operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General ApÂpropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
